title: More Properties (Field Interface)
text: More Properties (Field Interface) Define field interface definitions for subfields, variable length fields, and database I/O translation. Normally, you do not need to consider these properties. Define subfields only when accessing existing databases that contain subfields. Properties Fixed Length of Subfield Subfield Separator Identification Type Field Identifier First Subfield Identifier Database I/O Translation How to Working with Modeled Properties Related Links Modeled Entity Interface A Modeled Entity Interface is a Development Object that defines a reusable value for the Database Interface property of a Database Entity. Variable-Length Fields Variable-length fields store only the actual data in the field, and not the trailing spaces that would be added for a fixed-length field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
